rows.text:
Nearly two dozen members of the La Familia Nunca Muere ("The Family Never Dies") criminal organization were charged with racketeering and murder thanks to a Homeland Security Task Force initiative.

14 of the defendants, if convicted, may be eligible for the death penalty.

📰Learn more about the case and ICE’s @HSTFNCC partners: https://t.co/fEP4EIy0Jv

💻Learn more about the task force: https://t.co/Zr6By0HNlI

rows.text:
Today, I had the privilege of joining @POTUS Trump at the @USCGAcademy graduation as we paid tribute to the 2026 class of cadets.

These men and women are heroically answering the call to service to defend and protect our homeland and our freedoms. 

May God bless them as they faithfully serve our nation.

rows.text:
Irving, Texas, police charged Magdaleno Roman-Rosales, of Mexico, with kidnapping many years ago and he ultimately received a 120-day sentence for unlawful restraint. He was subsequently removed to his home country. At some point, he returned to the United States illegally. 

🔎ICE @ERODallas Fugitive Operations arrested him during a targeted immigration enforcement operation near his residence May 8. During the arrest, he put our officers, the public and himself in danger by attempting to flee.
 
🚨He backed his truck into an ICE vehicle. Before he was able to drive away, skilled ICE officers were able to gain entry into the vehicle. Then, Roman-Rosales refused to exit his truck and had to be physically removed from the cab. He continued to resist his arrest at every step. Thankfully, no one was seriously injured during the operation. 

➡️He will stay in ICE custody pending prosecution.
rows.text_resolved:

rows.text:
LOS ANGELES, CALIFORNIA: A criminal illegal alien arrested by @HSILosAngeles for producing and possessing child pornography has been SENTENCED to 50 years in prison.

The illegal alien, Angel Emilio Rodriguez-Marroquin from Guatemala, featured his own 8-year-old nephew and 8-year-old niece with SPECIAL NEEDS in some of the child pornography he produced.

Thanks to our @ICEgov law enforcement officers, this CREEP is behind bars — and, after he serves his time, he will be REMOVED from our country.
rows.text_resolved:
